articles.title: Rentomojo files draft papers with Sebi for IPO; plans Rs 150-cr fresh issue
articles.description: Online rental platform Rentomojo Ltd has filed preliminary papers with Sebi for an IPO, aiming to raise funds through a fresh issue of Rs 150 crore and an offer-for-sale. The company plans to use the proceeds for debt repayment, warehouse expenses, and general corporate needs. Rentomojo is a leading player in the organized online rental segment for furniture and appliances.

articles.title: AIADMK's Women Push In 2nd Poll Candidates' List As EPS Eyes Comeback
articles.description: Of the 127 candidates announced in this phase, 29 are sitting MLAs, 26 are former legislators, and five are ex-MPs - reflecting a conscious attempt to balance continuity with change.

articles.title: Noida International Airport Inauguration Live: PM Modi to inaugurate Phase I at Jewar today — Check traffic advisory
articles.description: Noida International Airport Inauguration Live: Prime Minister Narendra Modi will inaugurate Phase I of Noida International Airport at Jewar on Saturday. Phase I of the airport has been developed at a total investment of around  ₹11,200 crore under the Public-Private Partnership (PPP) model.

dailyNews.description: Tiger Woods was arrested for driving under the influence on Friday.He will be detained for at least 8 hours at a local jail before he can post bail. This is Woods' fourth auto-related incident.

dailyNews.title: Too loud? Ticket’s in the mail
dailyNews.description: Noise cameras are spreading across U.S. cities, issuing automatic tickets up to $2,500. NYC has already collected nearly $2 million in fines since 2021.

dailyNews.title: House Republicans pass rival DHS plan, setting up Senate fight as shutdown set to become longest in history
dailyNews.description: House Republicans passed a two-month DHS funding extension, but the 42-day partial government shutdown remains far from over amid continued gridlock.

topStories.title: Trump reacts to Tiger Woods' rollover crash as golfer faces DUI charge: ‘Very close friend of mine’
topStories.description: Tiger Woods was arrested on a DUI charge weeks before the Masters, and President Donald Trump called the 15-time major winner a close friend in response to the car crash.

topStories.title: White House slams ‘trash reporting’ over claims ICE chief hospitalized for stress, yelled at by Trump admin
topStories.description: Politico reported that ICE acting Director Todd Lyons was hospitalized for stress linked to Trump's deportation push, but the White House calls it trash reporting.

topStories.description: Joe Rogan and Dave Smith argue Trump's Iran war has shattered his historic 2024 coalition, and Smith warned it could hand the country back to Democrats.

dailyNews.title: Trump Offers More Aid to Farmers, a Key Support Bloc Hurt by Tariffs and War
dailyNews.description: The president announced new loan guarantees at a White House event that appeared intended to reassure a group that has found itself caught in the crosshairs of some of his major policies.

dailyNews.title: Outside Kennedy Center, Jane Fonda and Joan Baez Raise Voices in Protest
dailyNews.description: The pair joined in a gathering of artists and others who denounced censorship and faulted President Trump’s growing influence over the nation’s cultural life.

dailyNews.title: Kennedy Center Performer Asks Judge to Toss Case He Calls ‘Retaliatory’
dailyNews.description: A jazz drummer who called off a performance in protest of the center’s being renamed for President Trump said the president’s allies had sued him as punishment.

dailyNews.title: Iran war rages, Strait of Hormuz still blocked as Trump pushes for a deal
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is awaiting Iran's formal response to its 15-point peace proposal, as Tehran continues blocking the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" guests for March 29, 2026
dailyNews.description: This week's guests include White House border czar Tom Homan, Democratic Rep. Jim Himes, and former U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams.

dailyNews.title: 2/20: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court strikes down Trump's emergency tariffs; U.S. and Canada to face off for gold medal in men's hockey

dailyNews.title: Iran claims Strait of Hormuz is closed as Trump says talks are underway
dailyNews.description: According to a statement from Iran's Revolutionary Guards, the Strait of Hormuz is closed, and they vowed a severe response to any ship trying to get through. That seemed to contradict President Trump's claim that Iran had allowed 10 ships through the Strait as a gift. Holly Williams has details.

dailyNews.title: House GOP attempts to forge own path toward ending shutdown, disregarding Senate-backed bill
dailyNews.description: House lawmakers are at odds over a Senate bill that includes TSA pay, but excludes ICE funding. Eleanor Mueller, White House economic policy reporter for Semafor, and Riley Rogerson, House leadership reporter for Politico, join "The Takeout" to discuss.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Strait of Hormuz the 'Strait of Trump'
dailyNews.description: Trump recently floated the possibility that the strait could be controlled jointly by "me and the ayatollah" as part of a resolution to the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: TSA funding update: House GOP spikes DHS funding proposal, extending shutdown that's caused airport delays
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump on Friday issued an executive order to pay Transportation Security Administration agents during the shutdown.

dailyNews.title: Epstein victims sue Google and the Trump administration over alleged disclosure of personal information
dailyNews.description: A lawsuit filed in Northern California alleges that Google's AI features generated contact information for Epstein victims.

dailyNews.title: White House launches app touting Trump's record, with some key omissions
dailyNews.description: The app includes a link to report tips to Immigration and Customs Enforcement.
